debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2

X : Set α
hX : Maximal (fun X => @Graph.MatchingNumber α β (G - X) = @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G - X.encard) X
⊢ 2 * @Graph.MatchingNumber α β (G - X) = (G.vertexSet \ X).encard - encard (@Graph.OddComponents α β (G - X))

failed_attempts: sorry

    intro x
    by_cases hx : x ∈ V(G - X)
    · have hXv : ν(G - (X ∪ {x})) ≥ ν(G) - (X ∪ {x}).encard := by
        by_contra hlt
        push_neg at hlt
        have : ν(G - (X ∪ {x})) = ν(G) - (X ∪ {x}).encard := le_antisymm (le_of_lt hlt) sorry
        exact hX.not_lt_of_le (Set.subset_union_left) sorry
      sorry
    · exact inessential_of_not_mem hx
  obtain ⟨M, hM, hcomp⟩ := foo_of_forall_inessential h_iness
  sorry
